item.title: ZmPTF1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G024530 Gene Symbol: ZmPTF1 Gene Name: Pi starvation-induced transcription factor1 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: ZmPTF1, a phosphate starvation-induced basic helix-loop-helix (bHLH) transcription factor, contributes to root development and low-phosphate tolerance in maize.

item.title: ZmTCP42;tcptf38
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM2G180568 Gene Symbol: ZmTCP42 tcptf38 Gene Name: TCP-transcription factor 38 Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: Importantly, genetic variations in ZmTCP32 and ZmTCP42 are significantly associated with drought tolerance at the seedling stage.
